title: January 2026 Catch Limit Review
body: "These catch limits are provisional estimates based on the published written record of negotiations between the UK and the EU. These remain subject to change pending the publication of the Secretary of State Determination of fishing opportunities for British fishing boats for 2026.  If you have any concerns or suggested changes, please contact us using the details below:  Jacob Bestwick: 07469443840  inshorequotamanager@marinemanagement.org.uk "
